requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Paraguay has no confirmed nationally published EV connector mandate as of the dataset date, but an IEC/European-style connector specification is the reasonable project baseline for public or fleet charging where imported EVs and regional charging equipment are expected to interoperate. AC chargers should be specified around IEC 62196-2 Type 2, and DC fast chargers around IEC 62196-3 Combo 2 (CCS2), unless ANDE, INTN, a public tender, vehicle fleet, or charge-point operator specifies otherwise. Connector selection becomes mandatory when written into an ANDE-approved project, owner procurement specification, or charge-point-operator interoperability requirement.
summary.zh: 截至本数据集日期，尚未确认巴拉圭公开发布全国性电动汽车充电接口强制规定；但在需要进口车辆和区域充电设备互操作的公共或车队充电项目中，以IEC/欧洲式接口作为项目基线是合理做法。除非ANDE、INTN、公共招标、车辆车队或充电点运营商另有规定，交流充电桩应围绕IEC 62196-2 Type 2设计，直流快充应围绕IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）设计。当接口类型写入ANDE批准项目、业主采购规范或充电点运营商互操作要求时，即成为强制项目要求。
summary.zht: 截至本數據集日期，尚未確認巴拉圭公開發布全國性電動汽車充電接口強制規定；但在需要進口車輛和區域充電設備互操作的公共或車隊充電項目中，以IEC/歐洲式接口作為項目基線是合理做法。除非ANDE、INTN、公共招標、車輛車隊或充電點運營商另有規定，交流充電樁應圍繞IEC 62196-2 Type 2設計，直流快充應圍繞IEC 62196-3 Combo 2（CCS2）設計。當接口類型寫入ANDE批准項目、業主採購規範或充電點運營商互操作要求時，即成為強制項目要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — AC vehicle couplers including Type 2
IEC 62196-3 — DC and AC/DC vehicle couplers including Combo 2 / CCS2
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Project-specific ANDE, fleet, tender, or charge-point-operator connector specification

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. The GB/T AC connector is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 substitute because connector gender, proximity/control signaling, and contact arrangements differ. The GB/T DC connector is physically different from CCS2 and uses GB/T 27930 CAN communication instead of the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack. A China domestic GB/T connector package cannot be represented as plug-compatible with IEC 62196 vehicles.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口不能替代IEC 62196 Type 2，因为接口性别、接近/控制信号及触点排列均不同。GB/T直流接口与CCS2在物理结构上不同，并采用GB/T 27930 CAN通信，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈。中国国内GB/T接口方案不能声称与IEC 62196车辆插接兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。GB/T交流接口不能替代IEC 62196 Type 2，因為接口性別、接近/控制信號及觸點排列均不同。GB/T直流接口與CCS2在物理結構上不同，並採用GB/T 27930 CAN通訊，而非CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧。中國國內GB/T接口方案不能聲稱與IEC 62196車輛插接兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: GB/T-only chargers need hardware and firmware redesign for Paraguay projects that specify IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2. Required changes include coupler and cable assembly, locking system, pilot signaling, DC communication stack, temperature-rise testing, labels, user instructions, spare parts, and conformity evidence for the exact IEC connector configuration. Adapters should not be treated as a substitute for project-compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 对于规定IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的巴拉圭项目，仅支持GB/T接口的充电桩需要进行硬件和固件重新设计。所需变更包括耦合器和电缆组件、锁止系统、导引信号、直流通信栈、温升测试、标签、用户说明、备件以及覆盖准确IEC接口配置的合格证据。转接器不应被视为项目合规接口设计的替代方案。
gap.zht: 對於規定IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2的巴拉圭項目，僅支持GB/T接口的充電樁需要進行硬體和韌體重新設計。所需變更包括耦合器和電纜組件、鎖止系統、導引信號、直流通訊棧、溫升測試、標籤、用戶說明、備件以及覆蓋準確IEC接口配置的合格證據。轉接器不應被視為項目合規接口設計的替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but mandatory wherever IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by ANDE, INTN route, tender, fleet, CPO, or owner specification; GB/T is physically incompatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Paraguay Type 2 / CCS2 readiness as a connector and communication redesign unless the project explicitly accepts another interface. GB/T connectors are not physically compatible with IEC 62196 vehicle inlets, so connector compliance cannot be solved by paperwork alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目明确接受其他接口，否则应将巴拉圭Type 2 / CCS2就绪视为接口和通信重新设计。GB/T接口与IEC 62196车辆插座在物理上不兼容，因此接口合规不能仅靠文件解决。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目明確接受其他接口，否則應將巴拉圭Type 2 / CCS2就緒視為接口和通訊重新設計。GB/T接口與IEC 62196車輛插座在物理上不兼容，因此接口合規不能僅靠文件解決。
